subject: Convert dmaap-dr-node to StatefuleSet
commit_message:
Convert dmaap-dr-node to StatefuleSet

Change-Id: I540f7f2eb927896eb3f0c03b900f3bf6b9bc7ce5
Issue-ID: DMAAP-866
Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1724/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/1724

Patch Set 1:

Replaces commit https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/77719/

(stateful_node)[1] robot$ ./ete-k8s.sh onap health
++ export NAMESPACE=onap
++ NAMESPACE=onap
+++ kubectl --namespace onap get pods
+++ sed 's/ .*//'
+++ grep robot
++ POD=onap-robot-robot-677bdbb454-nr8cd
++ TAGS='-i health'
++ ETEHOME=/var/opt/ONAP
+++ kubectl --namespace onap exec onap-robot-robot-677bdbb454-nr8cd -- bash -c 'ls -1q /share/logs/ | wc -l'

++ export GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=1
++ GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=1
+++ printf %04d 1
++ OUTPUT_FOLDER=0001_ete_health
++ DISPLAY_NUM=91
++ VARIABLEFILES='-V /share/config/vm_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_robot_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_preload_parameters.py'
++ VARIABLES='-v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:821'
++ kubectl --namespace onap exec onap-robot-robot-677bdbb454-nr8cd -- /var/opt/ONAP/runTags.sh -V /share/config/vm_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_robot_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_preload_parameters.py -v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:821 -d /share/logs/0001_ete_health -i health --display 91

Patch Set 1:

-1 hold for merge conflict - too late now

Patch Set 1:

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/81988/ was merged before https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/81992/

in the future you can put a -1 (don't merge) on all reviews and put them +1 in sequence to merge them 1 at a time to avoid a merge conflict - especially on renamed files - which this review had - thanks Dominic
